name: @agent-bridge/openclaw-channel
description: First-class OpenClaw channel plugin for agent-bridge. Registers `agent-bridge` as a native channel (same tier as telegram) via the plugin-sdk registerChannel API. v3.0+: agent-driven reply routing — inbound bridge messages are surfaced into the OC agent session with a BRIDGE-CONTEXT block, and the agent decides which reply tools to call (bridge_send_message for the implicit bridge leg, telegram_reply / etc. for user-facing legs). Unifies behavior with the Claude Code channel.
author: EthanSK
